arts.ttl: Joelinton suspension explained as Newcastle United midfielder cautioned during FA Cup clash with Brighton
arts.sum: Newcastle United midfielder Joelinton picked up a yellow card during the first half of Sunday's fifth-round FA Cup clash with Brighton. He is also not set to miss any games in the Premier League just yet, but should he pick up one more card in the competition, he may be in line for a two-game suspension from then.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United rocked by Lewis Hall injury as star heads to see specialist
arts.sum: Newcastle United defender Lewis Hall missed the FA Cup tie against Brighton & Hove Albion due to a ankle injury. "I think he has the technical skills to play in other roles, but I think left-back is his best position for us.

arts.ttl: 'Arrogant bunch', 'won f*** all' - What Keane & Wright really think of Newcastle

arts.ttl: Brighton XI vs Newcastle – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Brighton head to Newcastle in the FA Cup’s fifth round this afternoon. The Seagulls are seeking a fifth straight win in all competitions having found form under Fabian Hurzeler. Brighton beat Bournemouth in the Premier League in midweek to strengthen their challenge for European football.
